goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'indian' food and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
Make sure you get 'area', 'address', and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'kirkwood house'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking' and 'star of the hotel'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge

Make sure you get whether they have free parking and star of the hotel
